emails.subject: The lawyers are moving
emails.body: The lawyers are moving Can you make sure Marcus Nettelton has three screens. One pc and two screens. Thanks Louise Kitchen Chief Operating Officer Enron Americas Tel: 713 853 3488 Fax: 713 646 2308

emails.subject: RE: The lawyers are moving
emails.body: RE: The lawyers are moving Please confirm one pc and two (2) screens or 1 pc and three (3) screens? Thanks! To: Shepperd, Tammy R.

emails.subject: RE: The lawyers are moving
emails.body: One pc 3 screens Thanks To: Kitchen, Louise
